block.text: Minos is a huge, burly man with a curling black beard. His uniform is gold-encrusted and ornate. He studies you with amusement. 'Duel you?' he says. 'Why should I duel you, Thalian vermin?' 'I'm the only Thalian awake!' you reply. 'You Juve to duel me! I demand it!' Around Minos, the other officers mutter. Test your Luck. If you are Lucky, turn to 314. If you are Unlucky, Turn to 297.
